ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lottery_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the lottery game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the lottery game (e.g., EuroMillions, EuroJackpot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game rules and prize structure */,
  "prize_tiers" INTEGER /* Number of prize tiers in the game */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the game began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the game ended (if applicable) */,
  "min_prize_amount" TEXT /* The minimum prize amount that can be won in the game */,
  "max_prize_amount" TEXT /* The maximum prize amount that can be won in the game */,
  "num_draws_per_week" INTEGER /* The number of draws per week for the game */,
  "active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the game is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the country */,
  "lottery_participation_rate" TEXT /* The percentage of the population that participates in the lottery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draws" (
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draw */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the draw */,
  "prize_fund" TEXT /* Total prize fund for the draw */,
  "draw_number" INTEGER /* The sequential number of the draw */,
  "jackpot_carried_over" TEXT /* The amount of the prize fund carried over from the previous draw */,
  "num_tickets_sold" INTEGER /* The number of tickets sold for the draw */,
  "draw_status" TEXT /* The status of the draw (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draws_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES lottery_games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the winner participated in */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the winner is from */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Prize amount won by the winner */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* The unique ticket number of the winner */,
  "prize_tier" INTEGER /* The prize tier the winner belongs to */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* The status of the prize claim (e.g., claimed, unclaimed, pending) */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* The date the prize was claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize tier */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the prize tier belongs to */,
  "prize_tier_name" TEXT /* A descriptive name for the prize tier (e.g., First Prize, Second Prize) */,
  "prize_tier_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the prize tier */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Prize amount for the tier */,
  "num_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners in the tier */,
  "prize_tier_multiplier" TEXT /* A multiplier used to calculate the prize amount for the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_tiers_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize distribution */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the distribution belongs to */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the distribution belongs to */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Prize amount allocated to the country */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* The status of the prize distribution (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* The date the prize was distributed to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distributions_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distributions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "euro_numbers" (
  "euro_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Euro Number */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the Euro Number belongs to */,
  "euro_number" INTEGER /* Value of the Euro Number */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position of the Euro Number in the draw (e.g., 1st Euro Number, 2nd Euro Number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("euro_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_euro_numbers_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id")
)
